name: EdwMbrCommRunCycUpdt_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'MBR COMM' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND (RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IdsMbrCommRunCycle} OR RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.CrmMbrCommRunCycle}) GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T JOIN cte ON T.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD WHERE T.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte.RUN_CYC_NO AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:
*****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************

JOB NAME:     EdwLoadMbrCommRunCycUpd

DESCRIPTION:  Update the P_RUN_CYC table EDW load indicator fields to show those records have been copied to the EDW.

MODIFICATIONS:

Developer               Date                         Change Description                                                                           Project #          Development Project          Code Reviewer          Date Reviewed  
------------------             ----------------------------     -----------------------------------------------------------------------                                   ----------------         ------------------------------------       ----------------------------      ----------------
Bhoomi                     09/29/2010             Originally Programmed                                                                      3035                   EnterpriseCurDevl             Steph Goddard          10/04/2010


Archana Palivela      08/11/13                Original Programming.                                                                        5114                   EnterpriseWrhlDevl  

Pooja Sunkara         02-14-2014              Changed the filter condition to RUN_CYC_NO >=                            5114                   EnterpriseWrhlDevl          Bhoomi Dasari            2/14/2014  
                                                                #IdsMbrCommRunCycle# OR RUN_CYC_NO >=  
                                                                  #CrmMbrCommRunCycle#

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
EDW Mbr Comm Load Indicator Update
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
